## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (format, types, comments)
- [ ] `pnpm build` runs without errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format` has been run (or `pnpm lint` passes)
- [ ] README / docs updated if API or schema changed
- [ ] If adding a new section: types, schema, SectionRenderer (and optionally `examples/landing.json`) updated
